blocks.name: core-schema
blocks.summary: Schema-first pipeline: schema.sql + sqlc.yaml + atlas.hcl + generate scripts.

blocks.name: graphql-server
blocks.summary: chi HTTP server + gqlgen scaffold + connection/filter/pagination helpers.

blocks.name: entity
blocks.summary: Scaffold a full vertical slice (queries + repo + graphqls + resolver [+ frontend]).

blocks.name: authz
blocks.summary: Casbin RBAC-with-domains authorization wired into chi + gqlgen.

blocks.name: auth-jwt
blocks.summary: JWT issue/validate + claims, login flow, auth middleware.

blocks.name: pubsub
blocks.summary: In-proc + Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY broker backing GraphQL subscriptions.

blocks.name: metrics
blocks.summary: Prometheus metrics endpoint + coded error registry.

blocks.name: jobs
blocks.summary: Asynq (Redis) background task queue + worker binary; optional admin via jobs-admin.

blocks.name: helm
blocks.summary: Helm chart: api Deployment/Service/Ingress/HPA, migrations hook, optional jobs worker.

blocks.name: admin-svelte
blocks.summary: SvelteKit + shadcn-svelte + Houdini admin shell with generated CRUD.

blocks.name: jobs-admin
blocks.summary: Optional admin dashboard to monitor/manage Asynq jobs (queue stats, retry/archive/delete).
